description: Turla Carbon scenario — Proofpoint TAP email threat events (December 2025). 2 events: messages delivered (NTFVersion.exe spearphish to Gunter@SKT.LOCAL) and clicks permitted. Used by SOCFWPoVSender to replay the email initial access leg of the Turla Carbon attack chain alongside the CrowdStrike EDR events.
name: SOCFWPoVData_TAP_TurlaCarbon_V1
